text: I feel enveloped by an atmosphere of intellect and inquiry, yet also slightly unsettled by the sterile geometry and artificial lights. The transparency of glass, the ordered emptiness of chairs, and the panels of information all draw me inwards, evoking questions about observation, boundaries, and the nature of human presence. I sense both the excitement of discovery and the tension of being observed, as if each surface might be a mirror reflecting my own act of looking.
